extract: Safeguard (Japanese: しんぴのまもり Mysterious Protection) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM20 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl TM19 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM051 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
